Full image. (If you seen this image used for a boat scenario, no you haven’t).

YAP SESH BELOW

I don’t really know what to say here… thank you for 500 followers, man. Shi crazy imo cuz like I was just doing this for gits and shiggles and creat whatever shi I could conjure up in my brain-rot-malnourished head. And now apparently 500 (almost 600) people also fw my lil brain and creativity. Lowkey the best bot on this site is period blood… ✋🙂‍↕️🤚

Also, I have like 2 freaky bots which I made like a couple months ago but was mad scared to post because it’s like… down horrendous type of freak. One is fem-sub, the other is fem-dom. If I should post them lemme know but don’t expect them to be peak of anything other than clapping ass.

ALSO, im doing it.

I really like this girl and we’re face timing all fuckin day and I made this bot at like 2am while she slept on ft… it’s crazy. Been homeschooled/private schooled all my life and neva been in a relationship before (not saying we’re in a relationship yet), but still all this is a first. Like not to be a corny ass nga but butterfly’s in my stomach is a feeling that’s new asf for me.

Chat, type 1 if you believe in me

Type 2 if you think I’ll get hawk tuah soon (Kidding, shes romantical not… hornyitacal? Stfu bro)

and like, it’s a win-win tbh, I get a gf or I don’t and let’s say she SHATTERS my heart, I’ll get peak angst ideas and my workouts will be better lol. (Think of the positive guys)

Anyways, yapping over. Yall stay safe, love ya, and God bless.
